title: psychotria archboldii var. archboldii
intro: Psychotria archboldii var. archboldii, also known as Yohimbe, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical regions of Africa. The bark of this plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly for its vasodilatory properties, which can help to relax blood vessels and improve circulation. The medicinal properties of Yohimbe have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sexual function, and aiding in weight loss. Yohimbe is often prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions, including hypertension and erectile dysfunction.
